programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby asks Philip for a native charm to help him seduce the delectable Ruth - but his dreams of a romantic liaison soon go up in smoke. Comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour, Richard Beckinsale and Don Warrington

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Temperamental tenant Spooner, a professional wrestler, is confined to his room with a broken leg, and makes life hell for Alan and Philip by playing his radio full-blast at all hours - so naturally they challenge Rigsby to confront him. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuthing spinster meets fellow enthusiasts Tommy and Tuppence at a nursing home, where the ramblings of an elderly resident prompt them to join forces and investigate the unsolved mystery of a murdered child. The trail leads to the Norfolk village of Farrell St Edmund, a community harbouring sinister secrets and tales of heartbreak. Geraldine McEwan heads an all-star cast, including Greta Scacchi, Anthony Andrews, Charles Dance, June Whitfield and Claire Bloom

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordly's sister arrives in Aidensfield with a renowned Polish violinist and his daughter, intending to stage a concert at the village hall. Disaster strikes when an expensive instrument is stolen - and romance blossoms for Steve as he steps in to investigate the theft. Meanwhile, a shady father-and-son duo set their scheming sights on Vernon. Drama, starring James Carlton and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Sugdens tell Rachel about their financial problems. Vic invites Viv to dinner to discuss their children. Steve finally tells Rachel how he really feels about her

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic appears very tolerant of the idea of Donna moving in with Viv and Terry. Chris offers to buy Kim out of the stables and the golf course. Jack is paid a visit by Andy's teacher

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve thinks the police are using Vicky to get to him. Jim appears in court. Vicky turns to Alec for help, telling him everything. Maureen claims Reg's flat as her marital home.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve visits Malcolm Fox to find out what is going on. Maureen has the locks changed on Reg's flat. Ashley and Kelly plan to spend the night together when Ken goes away on a course

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A blizzard forces the sleuthing spinster to spend a night in isolated Sittaford House, situated on a Devon moor. Without explanation, the building's owner, up-and-coming politician Clive Trevelyan, decides to spend the evening in a local hotel - only for a Ouija board to predict his murder. Mystery drama with an all-star cast, including Geraldine McEwan, Robert Hardy, Matthew Kelly, Patricia Hodge and Mel Smith

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordly's sister arrives in Aidensfield with a renowned Polish violinist and his daughter, intending to stage a concert at the village hall. Disaster strikes when an expensive instrument is stolen - and romance blossoms for Steve as he steps in to investigate the theft. Meanwhile, a shady father-and-son duo set their scheming sights on Vernon. Drama, starring James Carlton and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A prominent bank manager is almost killed by a hit-and-run driver just before he is due to set sail on the luxury liner Queen Mary. Convinced his life is in danger, he persuades Poirot to accompany him - and his valuable shipment of liberty bonds - to New York. But the Belgian sleuth's main concern is his own terrible sea-sickness. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor is found dead on Halloween with a stake through her heart and Hobson reveals she shared a house with the victim in her university days. A medium visits Lewis claiming to have foreseen the tragedy, and ghostly messages spelled out in fridge magnet letters start appearing in a house occupied by four students. As the detective struggles with the possibility his friend is somehow implicated in the crime, a tale of jealousy and revenge begins to unfold. Rupert Graves (Sherlock) and Niamh Cusack (Heartbeat) guest star

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks agrees to help old friend and partner Jimmy Valentine with an undercover drug sting, but when the bust goes wrong and a dealer ends up dead, suspicion falls on the officers. As Devlin pushes for the truth, the spotlight turns on Brooks' dark past, and a 10-year-old case involving no witnesses and a large quantity of missing heroin. Guest starring Hustle's Robert Glenister, former Rising Damp star Don Warrington and Anna Chancellor (Four Weddings and a Funeral), alongside Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Freema Agyeman

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: A gangland killing takes a surprising twist when it turns out the victim has been sexually mutilated. Andy punishes Janet by keeping her out of the heart of the investigation, and when she rebels, the ensuing row becomes personal. Rachel feels ambushed by Sean, who announces his mother wants to meet her - especially as she has spent years trying not to think about her own mum. Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp, Sean Maguire and Nicholas Gleaves star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective investigates a murder in the vicinity of a quiet country church, whose previous vicar committed suicide. As the case proceeds, he uncovers a sinister nest of evil-doing. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Michael Hordern, Angela Morant and Maurice O'Connell

programme.desc: Manchester United v Benfica. Barry Davies presents another chance to see the 1968 European Cup final at Wembley Stadium. With analysis from Billy Wright, and commentary by Hugh Johns and Ron Greenwood

programme.title: European Cup Winners: Liverpool
programme.desc: A look at Liverpool's four European Cup triumphs between 1977 and 1984, charting how manager Bob Paisley helped them to become a European superpower after his predecessor Bill Shankly had laid the foundations. With highlights of the finals and interviews with some of the key individuals involved

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: Harry Redknapp takes his team of ex-England players on a European tour, as they prepare for a rematch against the German Legends on their own soil. They begin in France at a self-catering hotel in the quiet medieval town of Provins, where Harry wants them to be on a detox and cook their own healthy food, but they don't even get through the first night without hitting the beers and ending up at the curry house

programme.title: The Sweeney

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar plays his part in a gangster's plot to trick his four greatest enemies into carrying out a robbery. Stephanie Beacham features in an early role, alongside Roger Moore

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gets his hands on the unreleased recording of a late, lamented pop star's final song, and decides to launch himself as a music-biz entrepreneur. Mel Smith guest stars, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Snooker v Darts
programme.desc: Short sports film

programme.title: Banks of England
programme.desc: A celebration of the life of former England goalkeeper Gordon Banks, who won the World Cup in 1966, and was also remembered for a sensational save from Pele in the tournament four years later. Featuring insights from past and present players, as well as Banks himself

programme.title: European Cup - Champions League Revisited
programme.desc: Manchester United v Bayern Munich. Bob Wilson presents another chance to see the showpiece match at the Nou Camp in Barcelona, which had a dramatic finale. United were missing key midfielders Paul Scholes and Roy Keane due to suspension, but could still call upon the talents of the likes of David Beckham and Ryan Giggs, while Teddy Sheringham and current manager Ole Gunnar Solskjaer were to make key contributions off the bench. With analysis from Terry Venables and Ruud Gullit, and commentary by Clive Tyldesley and Ron Atkinson

programme.title: European Cup Winners: Nottingham Forest
programme.desc: Between 1977 and 1984 English football teams dominated the European Cup and Nottingham Forest, under charismatic manager Brian Clough, lifted the famous trophy twice. Gabriel Clarke looks at how Clough and his assistant Peter Taylor built a championship-winning team and then shocked the world of football by dominating its premier club competition two years in a row. Featuring highlights of both of those finals and interviews with some of the key individuals involved

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: The second leg of the tour takes the boys to Italy, where they're holing up at a traditional Palazzo in Florence. Assistant Manager John Barnes thinks the lads need a bit of culture, so sends them off sightseeing to take in the Ponte Vecchio and Michelangelo's David. At training, fitness coach Luke Worthington puts the boys through their paces, but it's not looking good as the team is carrying so many injuries there are only three fit players. Plus, they've lost one of their biggest characters - Neil 'Razor' Ruddock - who had to leave the tour in Paris to return to London for tests on his heart

programme.title: Space Cowboys (2000)
programme.desc: A former Air Force test pilot, who was sidelined from space exploration because of his difficult character, is recruited 40 years later to help America's post-Cold War Russian allies. Teaming up with three fellow veteran airmen, he uses his expertise in navigation to stop a malfunctioning Soviet satellite from crashing to Earth. Adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Tommy Lee Jones, James Garner, Donald Sutherland and James Cromwell

programme.title: The Saint

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Robin is trapped on a lonely hillside by the Sheriff's men, and sacrifices his life so that Much and Marian can escape. Michael Praed stars, making his last appearance as the legendary hero

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Dempsey finds himself the target of a crazed female admirer. Guest starring Elizabeth Sladen and Suzi Quatro

programme.title: European Cup - Champions League Revisited
programme.desc: Liverpool v AC Milan. Gabby Logan presents another chance to see the memorable final at Ataturk Stadium in Istanbul. A talented Milan side raced into a 3-0 half-time lead, but the likes of Steven Gerrard, Vladimir Smicer and Jerzy Dudek did everything they could to ensure Liverpool would no go down without a fight. With analysis from Terry Venables and Steve McManaman, and commentary by Clive Tyldesley and Andy Townsend

programme.title: European Cup Winners: The British Pioneers
programme.desc: A look back at the early achievements of British clubs in Europe, including Celtic's European Cup triumph in 1967, and Manchester United's victory the following year, which came a decade after the Munich air disaster

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: In the final episode, Harry, John and the team embark on the final leg of the tour in Germany, as they prepare to face their arch-rivals at the Wacker Arena in Burghausen. After checking into their Hotel in the Bavarian Alps, Harry receives the German team sheet, leaving him concerned his team are going to have to massively step up their game. With the fear of the match going to penalties hanging over their head, Harry brings in a German psychologist to offer some advice. Finally the big day arrives, and Harry has managed to recruit Manchester United legend Teddy Sheringham, so the team finally has its missing striker

programme.title: Golf: PGA Tour Highlights

programme.desc: Misanthropic Korean War veteran Walt leads an isolated existence, and has a tense relationship with his family and nothing but contempt for his neighbours. When a teenager attempts to steal his prized car, he ends up trying to reform the thief, making a connection with the boy's relatives and defending them from a street gang. Drama, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Christopher Carley and Bee Vang

programme.desc: Harry Redknapp takes his team of ex-England players on a European tour, as they prepare for a rematch against the German Legends on their own soil. Carter also wavers, beginning to fear his boss's personal life has shadowed his judgement. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Snooker v Darts
programme.desc: Short sports film

programme.title: Banks of England
programme.desc: A celebration of the life of former England goalkeeper Gordon Banks, who won the World Cup in 1966, and was also remembered for a sensational save from Pele in the tournament four years later. Featuring insights from past and present players, as well as Banks himself

programme.title: European Cup - Champions League Revisited
programme.desc: Manchester United v Bayern Munich. Bob Wilson presents another chance to see the showpiece match at the Nou Camp in Barcelona, which had a dramatic finale. United were missing key midfielders Paul Scholes and Roy Keane due to suspension, but could still call upon the talents of the likes of David Beckham and Ryan Giggs, while Teddy Sheringham and current manager Ole Gunnar Solskjaer were to make key contributions off the bench. With analysis from Terry Venables and Ruud Gullit, and commentary by Clive Tyldesley and Ron Atkinson

programme.title: European Cup Winners: Nottingham Forest
programme.desc: Between 1977 and 1984 English football teams dominated the European Cup and Nottingham Forest, under charismatic manager Brian Clough, lifted the famous trophy twice. Gabriel Clarke looks at how Clough and his assistant Peter Taylor built a championship-winning team and then shocked the world of football by dominating its premier club competition two years in a row. Featuring highlights of both of those finals and interviews with some of the key individuals involved

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: The second leg of the tour takes the boys to Italy, where they're holing up at a traditional Palazzo in Florence. Assistant Manager John Barnes thinks the lads need a bit of culture, so sends them off sightseeing to take in the Ponte Vecchio and Michelangelo's David. At training, fitness coach Luke Worthington puts the boys through their paces, but it's not looking good as the team is carrying so many injuries there are only three fit players. Plus, they've lost one of their biggest characters - Neil 'Razor' Ruddock - who had to leave the tour in Paris to return to London for tests on his heart

programme.title: Space Cowboys (2000)
programme.desc: A former Air Force test pilot, who was sidelined from space exploration because of his difficult character, is recruited 40 years later to help America's post-Cold War Russian allies. Teaming up with three fellow veteran airmen, he uses his expertise in navigation to stop a malfunctioning Soviet satellite from crashing to Earth. Adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Tommy Lee Jones, James Garner, Donald Sutherland and James Cromwell

programme.title: European Cup - Champions League Revisited
programme.desc: Liverpool v AC Milan. Gabby Logan presents another chance to see the memorable final at Ataturk Stadium in Istanbul. A talented Milan side raced into a 3-0 half-time lead, but the likes of Steven Gerrard, Vladimir Smicer and Jerzy Dudek did everything they could to ensure Liverpool would no go down without a fight. With analysis from Terry Venables and Steve McManaman, and commentary by Clive Tyldesley and Andy Townsend

programme.title: European Cup Winners: The British Pioneers
programme.desc: A look back at the early achievements of British clubs in Europe, including Celtic's European Cup triumph in 1967, and Manchester United's victory the following year, which came a decade after the Munich air disaster

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: In the final episode, Harry, John and the team embark on the final leg of the tour in Germany, as they prepare to face their arch-rivals at the Wacker Arena in Burghausen. After checking into their Hotel in the Bavarian Alps, Harry receives the German team sheet, leaving him concerned his team are going to have to massively step up their game. With the fear of the match going to penalties hanging over their head, Harry brings in a German psychologist to offer some advice. Finally the big day arrives, and Harry has managed to recruit Manchester United legend Teddy Sheringham, so the team finally has its missing striker

programme.desc: Misanthropic Korean War veteran Walt leads an isolated existence, and has a tense relationship with his family and nothing but contempt for his neighbours. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers
programme.desc: As the UK enters its fourth week of lockdown, West Midlands Ambulance Service comes to the aid of the staff of care homes, who are feeling forgotten as the virus claims the lives of so many residents. Back in the control centre, Irum has had fast-track training and is plunged into the stark realities of her new role, while a national minute's silence for NHS and care workers holds a particular significance for her

programme.title: The Confessions of Thomas Quick
programme.desc: In a high-security psychiatric clinic sits Thomas Quick, Sweden's most notorious serial killer. A misfit loner who openly confessed to a range of crimes, including rape, murder and cannibalism, his story has shocked and haunted the Swedish nation for more than 20 years. However, new evidence - including testimony from the man himself - has taken this terrifying story in an even more disturbing direction. With full access to Quick, Brian Hill's film is a chilling documentary that uncovers a dark tale of murder and lies

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The award-winning show revisits of the most memorable stories filmed since 2011 at King's College and St George's hospitals in south London - places where life, love and loss unfold every day. This episode from King's shows how A&E staff care for a variety of patients, including a delivery driver who has serious injuries after a car crash, a young man who has a broken jaw after being randomly punched by a stranger, and a patient under arrest

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

Can the chef save the business and mend the warring family's frayed relationships?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

It's Sharon and Steve's job to help her fulfil her dream, but Sylvia is a woman who knows exactly what she wants, and that includes a single-storey property, close to amenities, with a large kitchen, separate dining room, and cream floor tiles. In Alicante, the Rodriguez family looks for a permanent home for lovebirds Adele and Phil. For this green-fingered couple, outside space is a top priority for their 250,000 euro budget

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

Elsewhere, Phil Spencer helps couple Mick and Bernie look for a property to downsize to when they retire in the South Downs

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Identical twins Nik and Jon Daughtry build two near-identical houses next door to each other in Sheffield, paying tribute to the city's industrial past. Their plans are incredibly ambitious, not only do they want to build the two houses for the price of one, but the materials and finish have to be absolutely perfect. With a tight budget, it's an almighty stretch from the start. As delays, overages and imperfections hit, it's clear the twins' intuitive and incredibly close relationship will be tested like never before

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. Will Naked Attraction's unique dating method help him overcome his shyness?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels across the United States in search of restaurants in dire need of renovation - and after analysing their situation, he has just 24 hours to bring them back from the brink of disaster. His first stop is the New York community of Congers, where he hopes to save family-run Italian restaurant Bella Gianna's. Gordon and his team work round the clock to clean the premises, remodel the interior and revamp the menu, while also teaching the staff to prepare new dishes and work together as an efficient unit. What will the customers think of the new-look restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: East Anglia is the setting as another three couples try to prove they are the best when it comes to throwing a dinner party. programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Writer and historian Dan Jones navigates Britain's longest canal to be built by just one company, the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. Built to link the economically booming counties of Yorkshire and Lancashire, this 19th-century superhighway was experimental for the time, and made Liverpool the busiest port in the world. In Burnley, the cotton capital of the 19th century, Dan visits the world's only steam-powered cotton mill, where enough cloth was woven each year to reach to the moon and back two-and-a-half times

programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Writer and historian Dan Jones examines the creation of the picturesque Kennet and Avon Canal, which was born from a murky pool of dirty deals and demanding landowners. It came into being thanks to the genius of young engineer John Rennie, whose inspiration and innovations created a waterway that linked Bristol to London. Dan discovers how Rennie plotted the canal's route using the most basic of surveying instruments and marvels at the engineering innovations that made it all possible, such as the water-powered pumping station at Claverton

programme.title: World's Most Pampered Pets
programme.desc: Documentary looking for the animal with the most lavish lifestyle and revealing why some owners spend as much money on their pets as they do on themselves. American reality TV star Aubrey O'Day takes her pampered pooches for an extreme makeover, including purple highlights for one and a pink Mohican for another, while Louise Harris from Essex auditions Britain's best-looking 'diva dogs' for a new fashion line. Also featured are the world's most expensive pet accessories and the sad story of Kalu the chimp - who missed out on an inheritance of £40million when its owner revealed she had lost her entire fortune

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways
programme.desc: Rob Bell heads to the industrial heartlands of north-east England, beginning on Wearside, where he learns about the world's first railway designed for steam locomotives. Rob also visits the ‘living' museum at Beamish and rides a railway from George Stephenson's day, following an old line into Hartlepool, where a medieval port was turned into a mega-centre of coal, rail and shipping in just one generation

programme.title: How to Stop Your Nuisance Calls
programme.desc: An investigation into the plague of nuisance and scam callers, such as incessant calls about PPI or accidents that never happened. Alexis Conran tells the stories of victims like Jeff, who lost £20,000 to fraudsters pretending to be his bank, and Jessica, who was brainwashed into thinking she was being monitored by the FBI. Alexis also meets police, bank representatives and members of the call centre industry to ask whether enough is being done to help, and reveals just what people can do to stop these callers

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A dangerous driver pushes officers to their limit in Derbyshire as the vehicle reaches speeds of over 150 miles an hour, before crashing into a ravine. programme.title: Shoplifters: At War with the Law
programme.desc: The security personnel at Coventry's West Orchards shopping centre receive a tip-off from Birmingham that an organised criminal gang is heading their way. In Weston Favell shopping centre in Northamptonshire, security guards are under pressure when a special event brings in extra shoppers, but an elusive serial shoplifter is apprehended stealing a trolley full of goods before disappearing amongst the crowds

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Kate Thornton narrates a selection of dust-ups with judges, live disasters and behind-the-scenes scandals from shows including The X Factor, Britain's Got Talent and Dancing on Ice. There are first-hand accounts from the stars that were there, with contributions by David and Carrie Grant, Neil Fox, Jake Quickenden, James and Ola Jordan and Jenny eclair

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton's patients include a horse with infected hooves, while colleague Peter Wright is worried about a pedigree cat in labour, and deals with an angry monitor lizard. The vets also take time out to visit the Great Yorkshire Show where Peter and Julian try their hand at judging

programme.title: OMG
programme.desc: Documentary about people who have undergone extreme cosmetic surgery to achieve their ideal appearance. The first episode focuses on three women who have tried to turn themselves into Barbie dolls, including a woman who has spent 11 years transforming herself and is now about to begin a new relationship

programme.title: World's Most Pampered Pets
programme.desc: Part two of two. Following people who spoil their pets, including former TOWIE star Amy Childs, who takes her pug Prince shopping in Essex at her favourite pet boutique. Comedian Shappi Khorsandi treats her rabbit to a royal grooming session, while New York-based journalist Dara Foster goes with her canine to Fetch Club, a disco for dogs. Plus, a look at Skunkfest masterminded by Deborah Cipriani, which is a yearly gathering for skunk lovers

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice offers advice to the owner of a four-bedroom Victorian villa in Garelochhead, Argyll and Bute. The house has been on the market for two months, and Ann thinks she knows why - it is far too cluttered with useless knick-knacks that are stopping the natural light from getting in

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: The award-winning BSL comedy sketch show, which takes a look at the funny side of Deaf life

programme.title: Arthur's Hallowed Ground (1986)
programme.desc: A cricket groundsman plans to make the perfect pitch, but soon finds himself fighting a losing battle against his home team, who seem hell-bent on starting a turf war. Comedy drama, starring Jimmy Jewel, David Swift, Vas Blackwood and Michael Elphick

programme.title: The Thirty-Nine Steps (1978)
programme.desc: An innocent man is informed of a devious plan to start the First World War by murdering a foreign minister. Almost immediately, he is framed for murder and embarks on a perilous cross-country trek to prove his innocence, pursued by both the police and ruthless spies. Thriller - the third film adaptation of John Buchan's novel - starring Robert Powell, Karen Dotrice, John Mills and George Baker

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: The Choice (2016)
programme.desc: Two neighbours find themselves overwhelmingly attracted to each other, and make substantial changes in their lives to be together - one breaking off a long-term relationship and the other conquering his fear of commitment. Over the next 10 years, their feelings for each other are tested by a series of challenges. Romantic drama based on Nicholas Sparks' novel, starring Benjamin Walker and Teresa Palmer

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War (2016)
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister Ravenna. However, as war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara unite with Freya in an attempt to end Ravenna's wicked reign once and for all. Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation (2015)
programme.desc: The team of secret agents faces being shut down when the head of the CIA convinces the US Senate that it is too dangerous. The operatives of the Impossible Mission Force become fugitives when they defy orders and plot to bring down a shadowy society of assassins. Spy thriller sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Ferguson and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Parkland (2013)
programme.desc: The aftermath of the Kennedy assassination is explored from various points of view. As medical staff try unsuccessfully to save the president's life and the FBI pursue the shooter, the family of Lee Harvey Oswald come to realise his role in events and a bystander faces a terrible choice after capturing the killing on film. Fact-based drama, starring Paul Giamatti, Zac Efron and Billy Bob Thornton

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: A fugitive fleeing from a police manhunt is desperate to see his newborn son. Needing a hiding place, he takes a recovering meth addict hostage in her own home. The pair make an unlikely connection as they bond over finding ways to cope with the challenges in their lives. Fact-based drama, starring Kate Mara and David Oyelowo

programme.title: Animal Farm (1954)
programme.desc: Animals rebel against their unscrupulous owner and take control of his farm, vowing to run things fairly, with equality for all. However, the pigs leading the revolt succumb to greed and corruption, culminating in violence and oppression. Animated drama based on George Orwell's novel, narrated by Gordon Heath and with Maurice Denham providing the voices for all the characters

programme.title: Fantastic Voyage (1966)
programme.desc: A medical team is miniaturised and injected into the bloodstream of a scientist to repair his severely damaged brain - unaware that one of the microscopic passengers has sabotage on his mind. Richard Fleischer's sci-fi adventure, starring Raquel Welch, Stephen Boyd, Donald Pleasence and Edmond O'Brien

programme.title: Chasing Mavericks (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a supposedly legendary stretch of shoreline famous for vast waves actually exists. He tracks down a famous surfer and asks for help in developing his skills to the point where he can successfully ride the challenging waters. Fact-based drama, starring Jonny Weston, Gerard Butler and Elisabeth Shue

programme.title: Before We Go (2014)
programme.desc: A woman is left stranded far from home after being mugged and missing her train. A penniless busker recovering from a traumatic break-up comes to her aid, and a close bond develops between the pair as they travel the city in search of her missing bag. Romantic comedy, directed by and starring Chris Evans, with Alice Eve

programme.title: Keeping Up with the Joneses (2016)
programme.desc: A suburban couple become embroiled in an international espionage plot when they discover that their seemingly perfect new neighbours are actually government spies. Action comedy, starring Zach Galifianakis, Isla Fisher, Jon Hamm and Gal Gadot

programme.title: Snatched (2017)
programme.desc: After being dumped by her boyfriend before their holiday, Emily Middleton takes her cautious mother Linda with her to Ecuador. However, their lives are soon turned upside down when the pair are kidnapped. Fish-out-of-water comedy, starring Amy Schumer, Goldie Hawn and Joan Cusack

programme.title: Ida (2013)
programme.desc: A novice nun in 1960s Poland preparing to take her vows meets her last surviving relative, who discloses the fact her parents were Jews killed during the Holocaust. The revelation leads the would-be sister to investigate her family's past and the lingering impact of the genocide on her country. Oscar-winning drama, starring Agata Trzebuchowska and Agata Kulesza. In Polish

programme.title: Ouija (2014)
programme.desc: A teenager recovering from the suicide of a friend persuades a group of her classmates to join her in attempting to make contact with the dead girl's spirit. They discover that she was driven to her death by dangerous supernatural forces, which they have unwittingly unleashed to prey on them. Horror, starring Olivia Cooke and Ana Coto

programme.title: Arthur & Mike (2012)
programme.desc: A man unhappy with his life fakes his death and begins travelling across America under a fake identity. He gains a companion when he meets a woman also fleeing from her troubled background, and together they try and put the past behind them by assuming the guises of various strangers they meet. Drama, starring Colin Firth and Emily Blunt

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie (1967)
programme.desc: A naive woman leaves her rural roots behind to seek fortune and romance in 1920s New York. She finds work as a secretary to a business tycoon, but he happens to be madly in love with her friend. However, before long she is wooed instead by a smitten salesman. Meanwhile, back at her boarding house, she stumbles across a shocking criminal enterprise involving the landlady. Musical comedy, with Julie Andrews, James Fox and Mary Tyler Moore

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee (2006)
programme.desc: A clever girl from a poor neighbourhood finds school frustrating and tries to hide her intelligence from her classmates. When she competes in a spelling competition, she is surprised to win and with the aid of a strict coach, sets out to take part in a national tournament and provide her community with something to rally round. Drama, starring Keke Palmer, Laurence Fishburne and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Hulk (2003)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Bruce Banner turns into the rampaging green Hulk after exposure to a huge dose of gamma radiation, prompting the military to embark on a no-holds-barred mission to destroy the monster. Meanwhile, Banner's unstable father resurfaces, holding the secret to his transformation. Comic-book adventure from director Ang Lee, starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott and Nick Nolte

programme.title: Warcraft (2016)
programme.desc: A kingdom stands on the brink of war when it is invaded by a vast horde of creatures who have travelled through a portal from their dying world. As dark magic works its influence on the world, two leaders from either side are set on a collision course with each other as they strive to protect their people. Fantasy adventure based on the best-selling computer game, starring Travis Fimmel, Paula Patton and Ben Foster

programme.title: Cold War (2018)
programme.desc: A musical director and a young singer are in love, but are doomed to be separated by differing loyalties and the Iron Curtain. Pawel Pawlikowski's award-winning drama, starring Joanna Kulig, Tomasz Kot and Borys Szyc. In Polish/French/Croatian/German/Russian/Italian with English subtitles

programme.title: Lucy (2014)
programme.desc: A courier is kidnapped and forced to become a drug mule. When she is exposed to the experimental chemicals she is smuggling, it boosts her intelligence and reflexes to superhuman levels. She uses her newfound abilities to get revenge on her captors, but as the process continues, she evolves into something more than human. Sci-fi thriller, starring Scarlett Johansson and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Alpha: The Right to Kill (2018)
programme.desc: During a police raid to catch a drug kingpin in Manila, a corrupt cop and his informant go on the run with a bag full of meth. But when an entire has been locked down, how long can they evade capture? Drama, starring Allen Dizon, Elijah Filamor and Angela Cortez. In Filipino/Tagalog with English subtitles

programme.title: Tell (2014)
programme.desc: In the latest of a series of botched crimes, Ethan Tell and his brother-in-law Ray attempt to blackmail a man for his sexual indiscretions. However, they don't expect him to open fire on the duo. Crime drama, starring Milo Ventimiglia, Katee Sackhoff and Jason Lee

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly signs everyone up for a holiday family photo, Geoff is excited to join in, despite Erica's reservations. Barry must face the fact that he has not been a good friend

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Feeling pressured to beef up the contents of his CV, Adam decides to try out for William Penn's pickleball team. Beverly is determined to throw Murray an epic birthday party

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Essex couples compete for the cash prize of £1,000 with Kellie and Scott, Stuart and Jamie, and Nick and Lisa taking turns to try to make the best impression. Married couple Kellie and Scott kick-off with a love-themed menu, but decorating company owner Stuart and his lady-of-leisure wife Jamie are shocked to see that the menu consists of not one, but two nearly identical dishes to their own menu

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkie groom-to-be Jai plans on having a wedding in the sky, neglecting the fact that his fiancee Leanne is terrified of heights

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As the end of the experiment nears its end, the grooms are given one last chance to woo their brides on an epic final date. For some the pressure of their upcoming vow renewals is taking its toll and it remains to be seen which of the couples will crumble under the thought of life outside of the experiment

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel becomes frustrated when Joe's demanding new job prevents the pair spending time together. She sneaks over to see him at work, but runs the risk of getting him fired. Meanwhile, Ryder witnesses a robbery and discovers that his interview with the local news team has been turned into a video that has gone viral. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords' favourite author, DC Parlov, gets in touch after his latest manuscript is stolen, so Jeffords and Peralta convince Diaz to go undercover with them at a fantasy fiction convention to find the culprit. Back at the precinct, Holt, Santiago and Boyle take a forensics course, but Boyle's big mouth gets him in trouble

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While the squad attends a funeral in Los Angeles, Captain Holt learns that he is in the running for his dream job: Commissioner of the NYPD. however, after they miss their return flight to New York, Peralta must find a way to get Holt back in time for his interview. Santiago tries to convince everyone that she can be laid back, Jeffords panics about losing his first-class flight, and Boyle pries into Diaz's personal life

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: A worried Mary sends Sheldon off to Sunday school after she finds him playing Dungeons and Dragons with Tam and Billy, but Sheldon is soon inspired to study a variety of religions. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster asks for a computer and unknowingly sparks a heated argument between his parents over the family's finances, prompting Mary and the twins to move in with Meemaw. Iain Armitage stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe's friendship with Nate and Gillian is jeopardised when a secret is revealed, and Zander begs Ryder to let him move into the basement without Lennox's knowledge, after he drops out of art school. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox secretly dates her teaching assistant, and when Joe and Mel find out, they try to put an end to the relationship - only things do not go according to plan. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam abandons Pops to go trick-or-treating with some new friends, but he gets a shock when he discovers what they are really planning. Meanwhile, Beverly dons a costume so she can attend a teenager's Halloween party in secret and protect Barry from social humiliation. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled by the freedom his new driving licence brings, until Beverly insists he sticks to her 10 rules of the road at all times. Meanwhile, Pops refuses to wear an emergency alert bracelet and is forced to call Adam when he suffers a fall. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When a fire destroys Boyle's food truck, Pimento unexpectedly shows up at the scene, working as an insurance investigator. Diaz helps Santiago to see that it's fine to get excited about picking her wedding dress, while Gina and Jeffords coach Captain Holt in the art of social media. Comedy, starring Joe Lo Truglio and Jason Mantzoukas

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle organises an elaborate scavenger hunt for Peralta's bachelor party, but the guys take some short cuts that throw the event into disarray. Santiago's bachelorette party goes awry when it comes to light that she once slept with a member of the band that is to play at her wedding reception

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: While Sheldon is busy obsessing over the status of Meemaw's budding relationship with his mentor Dr John Sturgis, George and Mary attempt to bond with their other children. Comedy spin-off prequel to The Big Bang Theory, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw is pursued by two gentlemen callers, only for Sheldon to interfere, forcing her to set some ground rules. Richard Kind and Wallace Shawn guest star, with Iain Armitage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon returns to Texas in disgrace when he discovers his friends tampered with the Arctic expedition data after growing tired of his quest for a scientific breakthrough. Elsewhere, Leonard becomes frustrated as constant interruptions hamper his attempts to woo Penny

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard stake their most coveted comic books on a bet over the species of a cricket, while Leonard and Penny struggle to recover from an awkward first night together. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Showcasing five of the soap's most talked-about storylines. Jennifer Metcalfe and Nick Pickard introduce the first of five episodes this week originally aired in the period from 1995 to 2000, beginning with one from 1999. Villain Rob Hawthorne seeks revenge on his former lover Lucy Benson by kidnapping her during her brother Kurt's funeral. Plus, Max doesn't know how to tell his mum Angela that Cindy's boyfriend is a danger to Holly

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples go on their final dates before the renewal of their vows. Nadia questions Anthony's integrity, while Simon and Alene reveal that they more than like each other

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Ben Corry is away for months at a time with the army, leaving stay-at-home mum Maria to discipline their four rowdy daughters. Jo Frost brings this military family into line

programme.title: Celebs Go Virtual Dating
programme.desc: Famous faces vet potential matches via video before going on socially distanced dates, featuring Geordie Shore star Chloe Ferry, rugby union player and Celebrity X Factor star Levi Davis, TOWIE heart-throb Pete Wicks and Love Island's Shaughna Phillips

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reformed teen rebel and unlikely baker Sunny, 33, is partnered with Misha, but is a cupcake enough to spark a romance between these two self-professed boffins? In a first for the show, 22-year-old twins nervously embark on a double date, with die-hard Cher fan Stephen meeting legal assistant Emily, while his sister Rebecca sits down with engineer Kristian. Plus, there is a special guest at the First Dates restaurant as maitre d' Fred's father visits from France. And naturally, he has a way with the ladies

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy starts to lose her powers as her 18th birthday approaches. She remains unaware that Giles is responsible, having been ordered by the Watchers' council to put her through a horrific rite of of passage. She must be reduced to a mere human and sent into a battle to the death with an insane vampire. However, neither Giles nor the bloodsucker are prepared to follow the Watchers' rules

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Xander's self esteem hits rock bottom - he gets no respect around school and fears he contributes nothing to fighting the forces of evil. He gets the chance to be a hero during a wild night involving fast cars, faster women, a gang of reanimated corpses on a crime spree and a spot of DIY bomb disposal - all the while unaware his friends are busy averting the apocalypse without him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively discussions from the comfort of their own homes on shows including 5 Gold Rings, The X Factor, Dragons' Den, Bodyguard and Wanderlust. First shown in September 2018

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Ben Corry is away for months at a time with the army, leaving stay-at-home mum Maria to discipline their four rowdy daughters. Jo Frost brings this military family into line

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkie groom-to-be Jai plans on having a wedding in the sky, neglecting the fact that his fiancee Leanne is terrified of heights

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Essex couples compete for the cash prize of £1,000 with Kellie and Scott, Stuart and Jamie, and Nick and Lisa taking turns to try to make the best impression. Married couple Kellie and Scott kick-off with a love-themed menu, but decorating company owner Stuart and his lady-of-leisure wife Jamie are shocked to see that the menu consists of not one, but two nearly identical dishes to their own menu

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam turns to the cool new guidance counsellor for advice. Meanwhile, Erica and Geoff try to hide the fact that they are living together

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Geoff struggles to balance demands from the Jenkintown Posse and Erica. Meanwhile, Adam faces a crisis of confidence over his career path

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Brighton - Pete and Jason, Chris and Barb, and Debbie and Richard - host dinner parties as they compete for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Andy wants to wow his bride with an alternative, skater-themed wedding, but his fiancee Bobby has always dreamed of being a princess on her big day

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples go on their final dates before the renewal of their vows. Nadia questions Anthony's integrity, while Simon and Alene reveal that they more than like each other

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: After winning a 10-course dining experience in a raffle, Mel decides to join an exercise boot camp to lose some weight before she gorges on the gourmet meal - and she even manages to persuade Joe to teach the class. Meanwhile, Lennox and Zander try to sell their web series. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz begs Peralta to help her break some big news to her parents, but her plan is thrown off track when Mr and Mrs Diaz wrongly assume that their daughter and her colleague are dating. The squad suffers internet problems after the Cyber Crimes Unit move into the office downstairs

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Gangster Seamus Murphy asks Holt to pay back the favour he owes for getting Diaz and Peralta out of jail, so the cops try to help the captain keep his end of the bargain without breaking the law

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon's germophobia lands him in detention when flu season hits Medford and he takes extreme measures to remain healthy. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Mary takes a job as church secretary, she finds herself becoming a marriage counsellor to Pastor Jeff. Sheldon and Missy spend their first afternoon at home alone. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Raegan Revord

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions between Sheldon and Penny reach a new high after a paintballing accident leaves an ugly stain on the awkward physicist's favourite sofa cushion. Meanwhile, romance blossoms between Leslie and Howard. Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon, Howard and Raj discover actress Summer Glau is on their train while travelling to San Francisco. Desperate to discuss the Terminator TV series with her, the friends devise a number of plans to engage her in conversation. With Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe volunteer at the school dance, but get themselves kicked out by the school's vice principal for bad behaviour. Meanwhile, Ryder considers breaking up with Stella. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel takes Joe's side when he is involved in a hit-and-run accident, until she discovers that the other driver is her beloved hairdresser Calista. Meanwhile, Ryder tries to win Stella back during lessons, much to the frustration of their teacher. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is determined to make friends with her reserved and softly spoken neighbours, the Kremps, so she bombards them with invitations to a barbecue. Meanwhile, Barry and Erica battle for control of the family's telephone line and beg their parents to get a second one installed. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly reignites a long-standing feud after she invites Murray's unreliable brother to visit at Thanksgiving. Meanwhile, Adam upsets the balance of power between him and Barry after he wins a ball game between them for the first time. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members worry about Diaz when she responds to an active shooter alert, but are instructed to stay back at the precinct building and are powerless to help. Peralta and Boyle try to find ways to assist Diaz, Jeffords has an existential crisis, while Santiago and Gina attempt to repair the broken toilet in the ladies' room

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz and Santiago team up to take down a ruthless killer who has managed to elude them for seven years. Jeffords helps Peralta to tackle the chores on his wedding planning list. Captain Holt and his rival Olivia Crawford try to convince each other to step down from the campaign to become Police Commissioner

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The prodigy dismantles the refrigerator to stop it making an annoying humming noise and is then forced to get a paper round to pay for the repairs to the damaged appliance. Comedy spin-off prequel to The Big Bang Theory, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw intervenes when Sheldon gets jealous of Dr Sturgis bonding with Paige, a rival 10-year-old genius. In the meantime, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon succeeds in getting Penny to conform to his high standards, so Leonard adopts a similar strategy for his romantic gain. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj meet two women at a goth nightclub and things appear to go well - until they are taken to a tattoo parlour

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj accepts Sheldon's offer to work for him as he is desperate to avoid being sent back to India. Howard starts spending more time with Leonard and Penny, who would rather be left alone. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Showcasing five of the soap's most talked-about storylines. Jennifer Metcalfe and Nick Pickard introduce an episode from 1999. In a desperate attempt to break free, Lucy tries to seduce Rob

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples are brought back together for one final dinner party before they head home to deliberate over the renewal of their vows

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: At the start of the new term, Carli organises a fashion show that Simon is eager to participate in. Will tries to shake off his embarrassing reputation, while Jay continues to lie about his sexual experiences. Comedy, starring Emily Head, Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon goes to his first gig since seeing Take That at Wembley Arena, hoping to impress an attractive girl in the year below, but Will, Jay and Neil tag along and jeopardise his chances of wooing her. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, who is joined this time by Rob Beckett, Katherine Ryan, Joe Swash, Angela Scanlon, Jamali Maddix and Maisie Adam

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Part one of two. New watcher Wesley Wyndham-Pryce arrives from England, full of dire warnings about the activities of a demon called Balthazar and his sinister acolytes. Unimpressed, Buffy goes on patrol with companion Faith, whose love of combat she soon begins to share - but unfortunately, their vampire-killing spree ends in the death of a mortal

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Buffy discovers the sinister truth about the Mayor, Xander and Angel try to get through to Faith - but their efforts are undermined by Wesley, whose attempt to take her back to the Watchers' council to stand trial only makes matters worse

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica's new job at the department store is put in jeopardy when Beverly takes advantage of her daughter's employee discount too frequently. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Divorced couple Stuart and Mandy arrive in the restaurant to offer each other moral support as they try to find love again. Mandy wants an adventurer to whisk her off her feet, and her date, globetrotting Adam, could be just the ticket. Across the restaurant, sparks are also flying as Stuart's cheeky humour has fellow divorcee Claire in stitches. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin shows Jill and Philip Hefford a selection of properties that fall within their £125,000 budget in Clearwater, Florida, where the couple want to buy a decent-sized home for Philip's daughter that can double-up as a winter-time holiday home for themselves

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Leeds and Preston in search of people's junk and clutter to upcycle into valuable new items. Henry makes an international set of clocks out of dashboard time pieces, while Simon builds an eccentric chandelier from car headlights

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Cheshire and the Wirral, where items include a 1920s dancehall lighting system, an antique butter churn and an old enamel advertising sign

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Billy, Gwendoline and Michael locate their heating problem, but it means that Billy - who's scared of height - has to repoint the chimney 20 metres up. Clive and Tanith get their hands dirty trying to work out what's stopped the fountain working at their hotel and Michelin-starred restaurant. Meanwhile, the clock's ticking for sisters Marian and Tanya as they try to sort out a winter's worth of problems

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton is in Gloucestershire, helping first-time self-builders Karen and Colin Thompson build a family home with a modern twist. Charlie has lots of suggestions, but the Thompsons have their own ideas and don't always agree with him. They're going for an ultra-modern metal roof, but Charlie is concerned that the rest of the house doesn't match

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Charing, Kent, where landlady Natalie Palmer hopes to show that her B&B, The Oak, is better than any of her guests' establishments. Everything starts off well when a couple are delighted to have enough room for their yoga mats, but the rest of the party are unimpressed with the extractor fans

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the White Lady in Worstead, Norfolk, on their second night, where proprietor Dennis Gilligan tells his guests about a spooky presence that resides there. The guests get competitive in a round of clay shooting, and debate whether they believe in the existence of ghosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Cranleigh House B&B in Combe Martin, Devon, where former couple Katherine Armitage and Stewart Johnston offer alternative accommodation for those who enjoy yoga and are seeking spiritual enlightenment. They hope the group will send out energy for world peace and healing, but Mike and Denise question whether the whole thing is a joke

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Denise Mitchell welcome the contestants to Beaches B&B in Paignton, Devon, which only opened for business a few weeks ago. Fellow competitor Katherine puts the owners through their paces at breakfast when she asks for something off the menu, and the hosts are pleasantly surprised at feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together for one last time to discover what they have been paid, and the identity of the winner. The Oak owner Natalie wants to know why some of her guests were not enthused by her extractor fans, but she herself receives aggression from Dennis over her criticism of the White Lady. Katherine and Stuart defend their vegetarian breakfast, and Mike and Denise deal with negative comments about their cereal selection

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: With numbers in the wild dwindling rapidly, Chester Zoo's black rhino breeding programme is a key part of preserving the species. Black rhino Kitani is introduced to new mate Magadi, but with injury a high risk during mating, keeper Babs is concerned that Kitani may struggle to defend herself, since she lost her horn after the death of her calf. Meanwhile, there's a surprise birth in the orangutan house, and older sibling Tuti has to fend for herself and set out on the road to independence

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A five-year-old Great Dane is rushed to Fitzpatrick Referrals after losing the use of its back legs due to a slipped disc, with complications leaving the dog fighting for its life. A woman and her two children bring their pet spaniel to the practice after it is hit by a car, and a 10-year-old collie with hip dysplasia visits the surgery

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Billy, Gwendoline and Michael finally hope to move into their chateau so they can host a hen party, although the kitchen's unfinished. In the Loire Valley, Paul and Karen rent out their chateau as a holiday gite hoping to attract more guests by creating an office in an old water tower. Meanwhile, Dick and Angel try to keep costs down when shopping for baths

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: After a four year stint living in New Zealand, ex-RAF pilot Jon and GP Gill Flewers want to build a Kiwi-style hill house on the slopes of the Malvern hills in Worcestershire. They plan to build an ambitious three-storey home clad in wood and stone, but the pair encounter problems as the site is so steep builders do not want to take on the job

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The medical team faces a range of sport and drink-related injuries on a busy Saturday, including two women hurt when the bar they were dancing on collapsed, and a bricklayer badly cut in an attempted mugging. The night's most dramatic case occurs when a father and son are brought in with life-threatening injuries after being attacked by gatecrashers at a family birthday party, one of whom was armed with a samurai sword

programme.title: The World's Most Extreme

programme.desc: Henry Cole is rather taken with a throne salvaged from an exotic nightclub and Simon O'Brien's restoration of a Victorian doll's house fails to go to plan

programme.title: Building the Dream

programme.desc: The competition heads to the Old Times Guesthouse in Ipswich, where mother-and-daughter duo Linda and Kelly Langdown hope a go-karting session will get the contest off to a flying start. However, a lack of breakfast options and corner-cutting on the guests' orders do not go down very well

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit the Flower Pot in Sunbury-on-Thames on their second night, where owner Simon Bailey and French manager Pierre Cudon provide stylish continental-inspired accommodation, but the hosts are left puzzled by some of the feedback they receive the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the family-run Dolphin Hotel in Exmouth, Devon, which has been a life's work for hotelier Jo Knowles. On arrival, Pat and Nigel find a suspicious stain, before the guests put on their war faces for a game of paintball. Jo takes everyone to a floating restaurant for dinner, and the next morning she presents a huge spread for breakfast - but her diners are suspicious that it has been laid on specially for the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants stay at the Mariners Beachside B&B in Seaton, Devon, but are disappointed by the cleanliness of the property. They take part in a town-crying competition during the afternoon, and host Nigel feels under pressure to deliver his award-winning breakfast the next morning. Come feedback time, the owners discover not all their guests share the same opinion

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid, and confront their rivals. Simon Bailey and Pierre Cudon from the Flower Pot feel the feedback left by Nigel and Pat Booth is a step too far, while the Mariners B&B owners hit back at the men's opinion of their establishment's cleanliness. Linda and Kelly Langdown of the Old Times Guest House question the rating of their facilities, while the Dolphin Hotel's Jo Knowles has a confession to make regarding her hosting

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Florence and Nadine, two of Chester's Grevy's zebras, are about to give birth, but other animals are struggling to produce offspring, including Iblis the Asiatic lion. Meanwhile, warthog dad Magnum is feeling the pressure of parenting as two of his older children, Dobby and Neville, are becoming increasingly hard to control, and Magnum is losing his hair with the stress

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick tends to a Newfoundland called Billy, who clocks up thousands of miles travelling back and forth from his home in Aberdeen for treatment on its legs. He also attempts to help Barney, a Yorkshire terrier that has a deformity in its neck that is compressing its spinal cord. For owners Linda and Barry, Noel is their last chance, but the operation involves high-risk surgery with no guarantee of success

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Billy and Gwendoline rope in Dick to help them put up a chandelier, and then they have to track down some wild boars that are causing chaos in and around the chateau. Clive and Tanith attempt to make a fully self-sufficient dish for their restaurant. Meanwhile at Paul and Karen's chateau, Paul continues the task of converting their water tower into an office - in 33-degree heat

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets architect and shed fanatic Micah Jones, who plans to transform an old agricultural building in Co Down, Northern Ireland. Micah plans an upside down, four bedroom shed using new techniques and materials, but the £200,000 budget runs short, and Micah is forced to take on some of the building work himself

programme.title: Hunt for the Arctic Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Cameras follow the multimillion-dollar expedition that discovered the Victorian ship HMS Erebus, intact and upright on the Arctic sea floor in September 2014. The story unfolds in the freezing Arctic, where search vessels battled with heavy sea-ice that threatened to stop the search entirely, to the dramatic chain of events that led to the historic discovery

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A look at some of the abuse paramedics have to deal with, including a man - thought to be having a fit - who verbally abuses and spits at the paramedics who are trying to help him. There is also a call regarding a baby in cardiac arrest, which actually turns out to be a hoax

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Home Bird Live
programme.desc: Stand-up show recorded in 2014 at Newcastle's Tyne Theatre & Opera House, in which the comedienne shares humorous insights into her life, including the need to put down some roots now she has cats. Plus, she offers advice on what to take away on a dirty weekend, how to teach a pensioner to swear and the correct number of meals to consume in a day

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

Later, over dinner, the hosts reveal who wears the trousers in their relationship, before Ken's jokes go down like a lead balloon

On arrival, Shirely and Vince find fault with the lack of headroom in their lodgings, while Adam and Naomi are bemused by the absence of a toilet brush in their bathroom

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Later, the guests take part in an archery competition, and in the morning, are unimpressed with the DIY breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rival owners meet for the final time on the last day of the competition to find out what they've been paid and settle some scores. Hosting skills, breakfasts, facilities and two toilet brush gripes are aired before the cash is counted and the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. Kendari the babirusa - a bizarre-looking creature also known as a deer-pig - is trying to give birth, but is being disturbed by a couple of mischievous otters. Young male orang-utan Willie struggles to impress the females, while Raz the aye-aye, a rare nocturnal primate related to lemurs, is being encouraged to share his home with two jumping rats

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A couple who have spent their lives saving stray animals bring in a three-legged cat called Jersey, who has recently become lame in her single back leg. The vet must decide whether the first-ever hip replacement on a three-legged cat is viable. Plus, a Great Dane is given a custom-designed spinal implant, and a Dogue de Bordeaux gets help with elbow dysplasia

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: At Billy and Gwendoline's chateau, Billy and his father try to level a patio so it can pass health and safety regulations. As Paul and Karen struggle to get the office conversion finished in time, a huge damaged pine tree needs to be cut down

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Mark and Candida Diacono, who have set about building a home in the shape of a plough on their 17-acre smallholding in Devon. With its complex curved roof, timber-clad exterior and steel-framed working barn, the ambitious project presents a unique technical challenge for a local builder and his team of employees, and the task proves even more intimidating when considering Mark and Candida hope to complete work on the build within seven months

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The A&E staff of King's College Hospital in London treat patients involved in accidents, including a construction worker who broke his leg in three places and suffered injuries to his chest after being trapped under a cherry picker. Plus, a man who fell from a ladder and landed on his head, and a widower who had a nasty encounter with a mandoline while chopping vegetables

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The three motoring enthusiasts head to Spain on a mission to help its struggling economy - but the convertible supercars they take are very expensive and anything but discreet. With Jeremy Clarkson in a McLaren MP4-12C, Richard Hammond driving a Ferrari 458 and James May behind the wheel of an Audi R8 V10, the trio encounter mountain passes, empty towns and an abandoned airport before creating their own street circuit in a deserted Madrid development. Plus, Sherlock star Benedict Cumberbatch sets a lap time in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on a project to build a car that can turn into a hovercraft and bring relief to flooded areas. Their efforts do not start smoothly, but it is not long before the trio are demonstrating the brilliance of their creation with an eventful journey down the River Avon. Plus, Jeremy grabs the keys to two variants of the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG supercar - the V8-engined Black Series with a roaring 622bhp, and the 740bhp Electric Drive, which is powered by four electric motors. X-Men and Les Miserables star Hugh Jackman is the latest celebrity to take the new Reasonably Priced Car around the test track

programme.title: Rick Stein: From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: The chef continues his gastronomic road trip from Venice to Istanbul taking in the countries of the former Byzantine Empire - a renowned melting pot of East and West. This instalment finds the gastronome in the city of Ravenna, where he discovers Piadinas, a thin Italian flatbread street food dating back to Roman times. He then crosses the Adriatic Sea to Croatia - a first for Rick - and a gets a chance to discover new a wealth of dishes such as pasticada, goat stew with peas and lamb peka

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May take a look at increasingly popular tall hatchbacks known as crossovers. Having concluded their primary appeal is to caravanners, the duo spend a couple of days in models by Mazda and Volkswagen and try to get a feel for what life is like for the people they believe would buy one. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond drives a pair of exciting Lamborghinis in Italy - the ferocious Aventador Roadster and the limited-edition Sesto Elemento, which carries an eye-watering price tag of around £2million. Two cars are also put through their paces on the test track, with James in a modern re-creation of the classic Porsche 911 and Aerosmith frontman Steven Tyler in the rather less exotic Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson drives the Jaguar F-Type sports car on some of Britain's finest roads, while Richard Hammond jumps inside the Range Rover Sport and gives it a thorough workout off-road, on a track and in what he believes is its most natural habitat - the lanes of Cheshire. James May goes for a countryside adventure in the New Routemaster London bus brought into use in 2013, which is propelled by a turbodiesel generator and a powerful electric motor. Inspired by the machines they have tested, the trio then meet to celebrate Britain's motor industry with a grand finale in front of Buckingham Palace. Plus, former Formula One driver Mark Webber takes to the track for a lap in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Sardinia to meet the scientists and archaeologists who have evidence that suggests giants once existed. Researchers have discovered abnormally large human skeletons in networks of elaborate caves, mines and tombs in Sardinia, China, the United States, northern India and South America. However, if the race did exist, it remains unclear as to why it has seemingly been eradicated from history

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The capture and subsequent suicide of Heinrich Himmler. One of Hitler's most feared allies, his earlier reign of persecution had resulted in the deaths of millions of people

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
