programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets out to follow the route of the historic Irish mail service from Ledbury in Herefordshire to Holyhead on Anglesey. He begins by tasting the Victorian drink perry, meeting a pedigree Hereford bull and visiting the world's first iron-framed building in Shrewsbury, Shropshire

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey along the route of the historic Irish mail service from Ledbury to Holyhead, stopping off in Coalbrookdale, Shropshire, to visit the world's first iron bridge. He also explores Wrexham's Chirk Castle, and tries his hand at making traditional Cheshire cheese

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce returns to BBC Caversham, near Reading, where objects brought in to be valued include a communion book that was originally owned by war poet Wilfred Owen, an Aston Martin sports car, and a finely embroidered 17th-century needlework box that creates a surprise when its value is revealed

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Naturalist David Attenborough shines the spotlight on some of nature's evolutionary anomalies and how these curious animals continue to baffle and fascinate. In this edition, he examines the unusual ways in which Komodo dragons and aphids reproduce

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Naturalist David Attenborough explores animal oddities, looking at two different animals with curiously distinctive evolutionary quirks, linked together by a common theme. In this instalment, he examines how hedgehogs and rhinos have developed protective skins

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: TV and radio presenter Chris Tarrant goes on three journeys by rail through some of the world's harshest terrain. He begins by heading to the Congo in central Africa to experience one of the greatest surviving railways of the colonial era, built by the French at a cost of tens of thousands of native lives and connecting the capital Brazzaville to the coast. Chris sets off on his scheduled two-day trip from the station at the port of Pointe-Noire, ending his journey six days - and a whole series of setbacks - later

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston travels to Jerusalem in search of Solomon's Temple. When the Romans sacked the city in 70AD, the fabled Treasure of Solomons was believed to have been looted and taken back to Rome. However, it is possible it was hidden away by the High Priests. Archaeologists Dr Shimon Gibson and Kate Raphael have dedicated their lives working out what actually happened, and discuss whether it is possible that Solomonic and Roman treasures lie undiscovered under Jerusalem

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris crosses Australia from south to north following the original ill-fated route of the 2,000 mile-long Adelaide to Darwin railway. After beginning his journey on a luxury modern train, he transfers to one of the line's surviving steam locomotives before hitting the Outback, where he quickly concludes that a 4x4 is a more practical means of travelling. He passes through ghost towns and explores abandoned railway relics before uncovering why most of the southern section of the line eventually had to be abandoned. At Alice Springs he hitches a ride on a freight train headed for Darwin and reaches his final destination after nearly 24 hours in the cramped cab

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Denise and Roger have fallen in love with the Breton culture and lifestyle. Laura Hamilton shows them five properties in north-west France for their £120,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at Just B in Edinburgh, where owners Karen MacDonald and Geoff Thomson hope their slice of zen will win over their guests

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almeria, Sharon and Shaun look for a countryside villa for football-mad couple Tracie and Justin from Southend-on-Sea, who are taking early retirement and want to make a permanent move to Spain. In Alicante, Sophie and Manuel are tasked with finding a holiday home for Tony and Ellen from north Wales. Tony is determined to make the most of his golden years after suffering a serious illness, and with a budget of 180,000 euros they're looking for a detached villa, with a couple of unusual requests thrown in

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The apartment block board's president denies Frasier's request to attach a knocker to his front door, leaving the shrink determined to fight his neighbour's tyranny. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Eddie appears depressed, so Martin enlists the aid of a dog psychiatrist to determine the root of his misery, much to Frasier and Niles's amusement. However, the diagnosis is that Eddie is picking up negative vibes from everyone around him, causing the Cranes and Daphne to assess their own lives. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton shows five apartments to Nottingham-based social worker Sheila, who wants to buy a holiday home on Spain's Costa Blanca

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Steve and Sandra met while serving in the Royal Navy, and now that Steve is on the verge of retirement they're looking for a Spanish bolthole to 'wind down' in. They love the area around Casares, so Jasmine Harman is on hand to show them five available properties within their £100,000 budget

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents' restaurant, Sal's Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after John's mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of house-hunters looking for homes in the historic city of York. Kirstie helps first-time buyers Tom and Timna, who met at university, married soon after and are now expecting their first child. With the lease on their rental almost up, time is of the essence find them their family home. Phil is searching for Yorkshire-born Rich and Kirsty, who have been living it up in London but want to move back up North to be closer to their family - and to start their own

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke meets an old friend in Norfolk who is planning to turn an old sewage works into a unique chill-out space for his family, complete with a self-supporting dome roof and a circular carp pond. A Midlands father and daughter work together on salvaging a dilapidated childhood treehouse with a budget of just of £300, George and Will find unusual inspiration as they continue building their own treehouse, and in Japan, George visits a breath-taking chapel made of intertwining concrete ribbons

programme.title: The Real EastEnders
programme.desc: Filmed in the summer of 2019 by first-time director Ashley Francis-Roy, this documentary presents the world as seen through the eyes of children growing up on council estates on the Isle of Dogs. Brendan is a sixth-generation Islander who's lived with his nan Lynne since he was placed in care when he was four, while 12-year-old Leslie wants to be an electrician, as well as a part-time rapper and gamer - but his mum Tina worries about him hanging out with boys who seek respect and easy money

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers
programme.desc: As the UK enters its fourth week of lockdown, West Midlands Ambulance Service comes to the aid of the staff of care homes, who are feeling forgotten as the virus claims the lives of so many residents. It falls on crews like Julie and Adam to provide help and reassurance. Back in the control centre, Irum has had fast-track training and is plunged into the stark realities of her new role, while a national minute's silence for NHS and care workers holds a particular significance for her

programme.title: How to Build
programme.desc: Documentary charting the step-by-step process of the construction of an electric London taxi, from the pieces of aluminium chassis to the £60,000 power train eco-cab

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the Devon port of Brixham, trawlerman Dave Driver sets out to sea on his boat in search of cuttlefish, while Mark and Isobelle Delbridge are determined to make a success of their new dairy farm on the southern edge of Bodmin Moor. On the northern reaches of Dartmoor National Park, horseback farmers Crispin Alford, his wife Diana and son Steve are preparing to sell their hill ponies

programme.title: Jimmy's Forest
programme.desc: A thick layer of snow covers the Norfolk wood as winter arrives, helping Jimmy Doherty trace the prints of birds and animals using it as their home. He also learns about how insects survive the season's harsh conditions, watches 80,000 rooks take to the sky, builds a Yukon firepit and discovers evidence that an unwelcome predator is residing in the forest

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Hull resident Peter and his mum Greta employ the skills of Jonnie Irwin to help find him his dream property in Huelva in Spain on a £150,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Oaklea Barns Guest House in Southport, Merseyside, where Mandi Magee and Paul Green think their impeccable standards will impress

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee teacher Kirsty Davenport kicks off a week of dinner parties in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where she hopes that a simple menu will impress her guests - property finder Ann-Marie Hamilton, sales consultant Russell Turnbull, part-time lecturer Adam Holt and hairdresser Becci Moloney

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ann-Marie Hamilton hosts day two in Eastbourne, where she plans to entertain her guests by singing in her garden. Fellow contestant Russell makes a lot of jokes, but foodie Adam does not seem amused

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Becci Moloney hosts the third dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, and prepares a menu of hearty food for her guests. Her outdoor bar makes a positive impression on rivals Kirsty and Ann-Marie, but Russell and Adam are puzzled by her collection of recycled toilets in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Adam Holt hosts the fourth dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where his fellow competitors' expectations are high. However, some of them are surprised by his menu - which fails to amount to much more than sausages and mashed potato

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Raconteur Russell Turnbull hosts the final night in Eastbourne, East Sussex. Having played his cards close to his chest all week with regards to his culinary skills, his plans for a fancy menu intrigue his rivals. However, for all the bravado, it remains to be seen whether he can actually cook

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps John and Soussan search for a holiday home on Spain's Costa Calida. The pair hope to find an apartment with a pool for when their grandchildren come to visit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Music therapist Sarah Hadley from Surrey has a long-term love affair with the Greek island of Crete, a place she and her best friend Sue Williams have been visiting together for years. Now, Sarah is after her perfect Cretan holiday home and has asked Sue to help her with the decision. Jasmine Harman shows them five incredible properties for a budget of £150,000

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Glencoe Villa Guesthouse in Featherstone, West Yorkshire, owned by Ewa Hunt, but the homely styled bedrooms are not to everyone's taste

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almeria, Sharon and Steve Garner help Huddersfield couple Carole and Graham, who want to move to Spain to be nearer their daughter. With a healthy budget of 240,000 euros, they're looking for the 'wow' factor. In Alicante, the Rodriguez family's clients are foster carer Jayne and her daughter Lianne from Blackpool. They've been holidaying in Spain for years and with a budget of 120,000 euros are looking for a summer getaway with room for all the family

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A spontaneous gesture lands the Crane brothers a double date with two beautiful women, and Frasier tries to help Niles overcome the feeling that he is betraying Maris when they all take a trip to a cabin in the country. Comedy, guest starring Megan Mullally (Will & Grace) and Lisa Darr (Ellen), with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles throws a house-warming party - but his new pet cockatoo threatens to spoil the festivities by clinging firmly to the top of his head and refusing to be dislodged. Comedy, guest starring Patricia Wettig (Brothers & Sisters), with David Hyde Pierce and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin lines up five properties for Michael and his wife Jane from Sussex, who are looking for a holiday home within easy reach of the coast in Spain's Almeria province. They have a budget of £90,000 and dream of finding a traditional property with modern features that the whole family can enjoy

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Hull resident Peter and his mum Greta employ the skills of Jonnie Irwin to help find him his dream property in Huelva in Spain on a £150,000 budget

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chef's attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentist's waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel are warming up for one of the year's biggest events - Angel's parents' 50th wedding anniversary, which involves inviting more than 100 people to a huge party. There's a bespoke menu to plan and prepare, so Dick has called in the cavalry, with his son James arriving from Cornwall. Together with some help from Arthur, the Strawbridge boys have their work cut out as they create dishes they hope will strike a chord with everyone

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of the best moments from the first series, featuring celebrities including Rylan Clark-Neal and mum Linda, Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Chris Eubank and Chris Eubank Jr, Oti, Motsi and Phemelo Mabuse, Martin and Roman Kemp, and Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock. Among the shows under review are Love Island, Naked Attraction, Killing Eve and First Dates, as well as the films Titanic and American Pie

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team return for an eleventh series. In the first episode, a tiny Jackahuahua puppy is in need of emergency spinal surgery after being attacked by a dog in the park, but it is not certain that he will be able to get back on his feet again after the operation. Elsewhere, a Bernese has a rare cyst in his elbow, requiring a challenging operation for removal, and an excitable Labrador requires elbow replacement surgery, which will result in a long and difficult road to recovery

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows Matt and Sophie White from Sussex as they build a giant family house of fun for themselves and their children. Going against the norm of designing a serious and practical home, the couple's property features a revolving bookcase door, secret dens, hiding places and a fireman's pole. Matt uses a steel frame system to allow them to change the layout of the property, and other changes include amending the window shapes and sizes, and adding a half floor to create a James Bond room

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Harry and Briony Anscombe, who have decided to move from London to Cornwall with their three young children and begin building work on an ambitious house, inspired by American modernist properties. With a budget of just £400,000, Harry opts to project manage himself, paying local builders by the hour, but his lack of experience in construction proves to be problematic

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Liam Charles and Tom Allen host the final of the baking contest, featuring the best three teams to appear on the series in the past nine weeks. The first round sees the duos challenged to make edible chocolate hats that can be worn by models in a catwalk show. These must be accompanied by a set of 48 filled chocolates. The final challenge of the series involves creating a historical banquet in just seven hours, to be served to family and friends in the Great Hall at Firle Place. After this, Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden will make their choice and the winners will be crowned

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Eco campaigner Hector Christie holds the first dinner party in Devon, hoping his selection of raw food and home-grown produce will win him the £1,000 cash prize. His guests - make-up artist Kirsten Brend, slate salesman Damion Fearnley, theatre nurse Jenny Fox and retired housekeeper Viv Foster - are more interested in the stately home he lives in, so the host reveals an unusual surprise to command their attention

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Make-up artist Kirsten Brend showcases her Danish roots while hosting the second dinner party in Devon, serving a traditional menu to celebrate her heritage and some Eurovision-style entertainment to demonstrate her singing skills

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Slate salesman Damion Fearnley hosts the third dinner party in Devon, hoping to impress his guests with a carefully crafted menu of restaurant quality food. No dish is as simple as it sounds, and Damion has given each one his own little twist. Unfortunately for him, two of the diners seem more intent on taking verbal swipes at each other than bites out of his food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Theatre nurse Jenny Fox's dinner party in Devon fails to get off to the best start when Damion Fearnley is not impressed by the dishes on offer and Hector Christie takes exception to her choice of main course. Meanwhile, the tension between Viv Foster and Kirsten Brend continues as they show no sign of putting their disagreement behind them

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired housekeeper Viv Foster hosts the final night in Devon, and feels in confident mood after years of experience serving the rich and famous. She pulls out all the stops to impress with a butler, silver service and her favourite tried and tested recipes. With tension mounting between Viv and Kirsten for some time though, her plans to put on the perfect evening may yet be sabotaged

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton is on the Costa Calida in Spain, with Nadine, who is looking to permanently relocate to Spain with her husband Tyler. Nadine's best friend Jannette is coming on the search to offer a helping hand as shows the friends five properties within the budget of £160,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Godsisters Roselyn Fleary and Jennifer Lawrence from London have always been best friends and holiday together every year on the Caribbean island of Grenada. As they both have family roots on the island they are now looking for a holiday home that could one day be a full-time retirement location. With a budget of £250,000 Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties, but can she tick all of their boxes?

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: While serving a community service order for speeding, Roz develops a reputation at a retirement home as the 'angel of death' after everyone she takes care of dies. Disturbed by the events, she turns to Frasier for advice. Guest starring James Earl Jones

programme.desc: Frederick visits Seattle and asks Frasier to take part in the radio station softball game, leaving him with only two days to learn to play the sport. Meanwhile, Niles becomes jealous of his nephew, who has developed a crush on Daphne

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bob's in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters aren't improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before it's too late

programme.title: Our Baby: A Modern Miracle
programme.desc: Documentary following transgender couple Hannah and Jake Graf as they start a family. Filmed over the course of a year, the programme follows Hannah and Jake from their first meeting with a surrogate through to their baby's birth in the midst of lockdown. The film also explores their experiences of transitioning and the prejudice they've faced, as they strive to realise their dream of becoming parents

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp searches for a family home around Hove on the south coast of England for Duncan, Anna and their three children, as they return from seven years living in Switzerland. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode's patients include a builder who fell into a hole on the site, dislocating his shoulder and leaving the bone painfully wedged against his ribs. It is an injury that Chris has never seen before in the 30 years she has worked in emergency medicine. Elsewhere, a woman who has collapsed twice within a week and an ex-convict who has had a seizure are also brought in for treatment

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers

programme.title: Best of Crufts
programme.desc: Clare Balding presents a history of the ultimate prize at Crufts, from the first winner in 1928 to the success of 2020's wire-haired dachshund Maisie. programme.desc: First episode of the American comedy starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing. Grace accepts her no-good boyfriend's marriage proposal, despite her best friend Will's disapproval, threatening the pals' long-standing relationship. With Megan Mullally and Sean Hayes

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is slowly driven up the wall by flatmate Jack's self-obsessed attitude, but still advises Grace to hunt for a flat of her own instead of asking her to move in. programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Domestic disharmony is the order of the day as Grace gets the DIY bug and decides the bathroom is in need of renovation - but Will struggles to cope with her taste in decor. Meanwhile, Jack receives a much-needed helping hand with his CV. Comedy, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay nominates Michael for the Small Businessman of the Year award and he assumes he is going to win it after his close friend on the board hints that it is a done deal

programme.desc: Part one of two. Jay and Michael return from a night out to find Junior and his new girlfriend Vanessa in a compromising position. American sitcom, starring Damon Wayans

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Alex is hit with a £7,000 bill after his tenant is found to have been running a business from his property. Developer Jon calls in an eviction specialist to rid a disused tram station of squatters, and Vicki is surprised to find out that a tenant has stopped paying rent and moved in a sub-tenant

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Watford builder David Simpson has a fight on his hands when his long-term tenant moves her boyfriend in and suddenly decides to stop paying - and when he tries to evict her, she makes life difficult. In Woolwich, lawyer Chris Sharpe helps a client whose property has been taken over by squatters, who have changed the locks and claim they are legitimately renting the house

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than £12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. Meanwhile, agents in London chase up more than £5,000 owed by a tenant to her former landlord for rent arrears, and also attempt to retrieve over £6,000 owed by a property developer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers try to recover £13,000 owed by a high-performance car dealer in Birmingham, and in Wolverhampton the agents chase nearly £2,000 owed to a car hire company. Elsewhere, officers visit a family in Kent to try to collect more than £5,000, but an emotional backstory means they are forced to make a sensitive decision

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire, the agents chase up a £3,000 deposit owed by a landlord to his tenant, and officers in Birmingham try to recover £25,000 from a nightclub owner for unpaid solicitor fees. Meanwhile, agents Max and Paul are in Surrey as they attempt to collect more than £3,000 owed to a garage after a customer disputed the repairs made to his van

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Officers chase £4,500 in court fees in north Wales after a property deal turned sour, and in Birmingham the agents try to collect over £3,500 from a single mum who defaulted on loan repayments. Elsewhere in Worcestershire, the enforcement agents try to recover more than £10,000 from a shop-keeper for fraudulently keeping a deposit during a property sale

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A foul-mouthed pensioner pushes Barry's patience to the limit, Sarah gives a bad-boy biker an early birthday present and Jim's Audi S3 is outclassed by a car 30 years its senior. Plus, Mike is left open-mouthed when he encounters a drink-driver who is three times over the limit

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The hunt for a suspected burglar takes an unexpected turn, a late-night stop reveals a bag of drugs, Jon Peacock has a tussle with a fallen tree and Barry Peach deals with a case of some very hot dogs locked inside a car

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Terese stresses that she has inadvertently bribed a cop, so confronts Dax. Roxy's attempt to get into Sheila's good books fall flat when Sheila overhears a conversation with Harlow

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ziggy waits in suspense as Maggie and Ben painfully deliberate over the future of their marriage. Jasmine gets a shock when a mother from the forum arrives at the gym

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The second of a two-part special of the programme that examines the lives of people on benefits, focusing on those who have large families. Tom and Stacey claim more than £70,000 a year from the state to support themselves and their 14 children, and run their household with military precision

programme.title: Benefits Britain: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: This week's edition heads to two seaside towns in the south of England. Dave is an English Defence League supporter who lives in Cliftonville, one of the most deprived areas of Margate, Kent, and has very strong views on how his neighbourhood and the country have changed because of immigration, while 28-year-old Stacie is a single mum struggling to survive on benefits in a small bedsit in Hastings, East Sussex

programme.title: The Hunger Games (2012)
programme.desc: A totalitarian future holds an annual nationally televised event in which two children from each of its regions fight to the death until only one remains. A teenage girl takes her younger sister's place in the games and must pit her wits against the deadly combat skills of her rivals. Sci-fi adventure based on Suzanne Collins' novel, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Woody Harrelson and Elizabeth Banks

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

Plus, psoriasis-sufferer John feels he's exhausted all the options for treatment, but can Dr Emma McMullen offer him a ray of hope?

programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life

Meanwhile, Director Vance and FBI Agent Fornell travel to London as part of the ongoing case involving the escaped British spies

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team, alongside the FBI and MI6, continues the international manhunt for a disgraced British spy who is seeking revenge on the agents he blames for his wife's death. A re-examination of the fugitive's conviction for selling military intelligence reveals that he may have been framed - and the identity of the only person who can clear his name

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The naval crime drama spin-off returns, picking up with Pride and his team in the wake of the departure of Meredith Brody, who left for good after a close call with a terrorist. Concerns are raised about whether the unit has been irreparably compromised, and FBI special agent Tammy Gregorio is assigned to discover the truth. However, the agents are quickly given a chance to prove their effectiveness, as they co-ordinate with various other federal agencies to track down a sniper targeting special events across New Orleans. Starring Scott Bakula

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Following their investigation into departed agent Brody's relationship with terrorist John Russo, the FBI continues to cause trouble for the team. This time, the bureau turns its attention to a homicide case, in which Pride's friend Elvis Bertrand, a US Navy intelligence analyst, has been labelled the prime suspect. Determined to keep the matter within the Navy, Pride and his colleagues manage to get hold of crucial evidence, forcing the FBI to work with them

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When the body of a missing Navy commander is found, Gibbs and his team are ordered to work with former FBI agent Tobias Fornell, the private investigator who was hired to find him. Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette star

programme.desc: An investment analyst is found hanged from her four-poster bed, her body covered in piercings, cuts and bruises, leading the police to conclude her death occurred during a kinky sex session. Crime drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman who claims she has been raped turns to the Unit for help, but the team cannot get enough evidence against the prime suspect and is forced to drop the case. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to investigate the murder of a notorious bounty hunter. Piecing together his final movements, they turn their attentions to a meeting between the victim and an ambitious journalist, which may be able to shed light on what happened

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A retired cop exacts rough justice and kills the small-time thug responsible for fatally stabbing a Mob accountant, but tries to avoid going to trial by admitting he falsified evidence during his time on the force - a potentially damaging confession that could jeopardise many previous convictions. programme.desc: Detectives Briscoe and Logan face a race against time to catch a serial killer carrying out a series of racially motivated murders. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Christopher Noth

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a decorated petty officer, whose body was found in a sports arena. A chain of evidence leads the investigators to a past kidnapping case involving another petty officer, who was last seen in Mexico. Meanwhile, Tammy Gregorio officially joins the team, as Pride seeks a way to get the FBI off his back

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The naval investigators turn their attention to the murder of a lieutenant, who was tortured before being killed. To avoid meeting a similar end, Sebastian is forced to put his gaming and hacking skills to use in assisting in a prison break

programme.desc: Stabler and Benson get mixed up in the murky world of politics after a coalition leader's gay son is found murdered on the roof of his apartment. programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green track down a disturbed woman who has not only murdered a young mother and stolen her five-day-old son, but also managed to convince her own husband that the baby is really theirs. As the case goes to trial, another man comes forward claiming to be the child's real father, leaving McCoy and Borgia facing a dilemma

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A vial containing a sample of the Sars virus is stolen during a carjacking, leaving Briscoe and Green spearheading a wide-scale hunt for a man dubbed patient zero - the first victim to have contracted the illness. They finally home in on a female reporter who recently ended a long-term relationship with a virologist

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An actress is found stabbed to death in an award-winning songwriter's apartment, and police believe the musician knows more than he is letting on. Clues lead them to the victim's therapy group as they try to discover who would profit from her death. Starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An undercover policewoman is murdered, and the team is charged with finding out how her cover was blown. Following a series of revelations, the investigation leads to a worker in a prominent congressman's office - but the suspect has a seemingly watertight alibi. Legal drama, starring Sam Waterston, Dennis Farina and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy man is found dead in his bed, and the team receive an anonymous tip that he was murdered. Logan and Briscoe encounter difficulties at the scene when the widow and her attorney refuse to allow an autopsy. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a superintendent is found in the basement of his building, leading Logan and Briscoe to suspect his death was the result of a break-in gone wrong. However, forensic evidence points the finger of suspicion at the victim's 17-year-old son, who Dr Olivet believes is an abusive sociopath. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Following their investigation into departed agent Brody's relationship with terrorist John Russo, the FBI continues to cause trouble for the team. This time, the bureau turns its attention to a homicide case, in which Pride's friend Elvis Bertrand, a US Navy intelligence analyst, has been labelled the prime suspect. Determined to keep the matter within the Navy, Pride and his colleagues manage to get hold of crucial evidence, forcing the FBI to work with them

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a decorated petty officer, whose body was found in a sports arena. The victim was discovered clutching a rifle, and it seems he had been engaged in a fire-fight, but when the agents fire the weapon, they discover it is a tranquilliser gun. A chain of evidence leads the investigators to a past kidnapping case involving another petty officer, who was last seen in Mexico. Meanwhile, Tammy Gregorio officially joins the team, as Pride seeks a way to get the FBI off his back

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride and his team investigate when a private plane crashes in a bayou. Meanwhile, Gregorio tries to decide whether to stay in New Orleans or return to Washington, and LaSalle and Percy interview candidates to replace Brody

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The agents are called in to review unorthodox training exercises after a Navy Seal candidate is killed weeks before his graduation. Meanwhile, LaSalle tries to avoid an old flame

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Leaving flowers at his mother's grave, Bobby discovers a picture that indicates an old enemy has returned. The case gets more complex when his brother is found dead and an old mentor survives a poison attack, making Bobby the prime suspect. Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Tony Goldwyn star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A prominent judge who was famed for his support of women's rights is found dead in his car, and the ensuing murder investigation leads the detectives to discover he was not as squeaky clean as he had seemed - and was linked to a case of corruption on the parole board. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cragen is assigned to a five-year-old case on which the statute of limitations has nearly expired. The investigation relates to crimes committed by a serial rapist, and he must persuade the victims to talk before it is too late. Hard-hitting drama, starring Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson are assigned the case of a taxi driver found stabbed to death, and it soon emerges that the victim had a selection of false identities, leading the cops on a wild goose chase before they uncover any concrete leads. First episode of the spin-off drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Christopher Meloni and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The officers are called in to investigate when a successful newspaper columnist falls six storeys to her death, dressed only in her underwear. It soon emerges her psychiatrist had visited the apartment that day for dinner, but he seems reluctant to tell the police what went on, making them believe he could be hiding vital clues. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of neighbourhood policing teams. Officers investigate a suspicious car accident in a remote wildlife park by the Yorkshire coast - and discover that the vehicle was used by a burglar hoping to make a speedy getaway from the scene of the crime. Plus, neighbourhood police from the Humberside force use social media to make the public aware of an arrest, and a team in Bridlington, East Yorkshire, keeps worried onlookers at bay as members of the emergency services tackle a three-storey fire in which two residents are trapped. Presented by Rav Wilding

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series focuses on Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Gwen becomes the traditional damsel in distress when she is snatched from Camelot and locked in a dark tower, so Arthur mounts his trusty steed and sets out to rescue his bride, accompanied by Merlin and his loyal knights. However, her kidnapper is none other than Morgana, who has imprisoned the queen in a place that haunts the dreams of men. Before them lays a landscape riddled with hidden dangers, perilous obstacles and magical beings - but surely, the sorceress wouldn't have made it quite that easy?

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Jim Brass takes time off from his regular duties to visit his daughter in Hollywood and help investigate the disappearance of her friend, a mystery the police are strangely reluctant to look into. Inquiries lead him to the abandoned car she was last seen in, and he subsequently uncovers a connection between the vehicle and a mayoral candidate. Detective drama, starring Paul Guilfoyle and Gary Dourdan

programme.title: Callan

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Norwich couple Simon and Caitlin embark on an ambitious project under the watchful eye of expert Sarah Beeny. They plan to buy a former council house, invest all their savings and completely renovate it in the hope that a subsequent sale will raise enough money to move onto the next rung of the property ladder

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: Calculated Risk (1963)
programme.desc: An ex-convict plans one last daring heist, by tunneling into a bank vault through the basement of a neighbouring house. Crime drama, starring William Lucas and John Rutland

programme.title: The Case of the Frightened Lady (1940)
programme.desc: A woman employed as a secretary to her aristocratic aunt has to contend with sinister servants plotting behind her back and a scheme by her employer to marry her off to her own cousin. The situation is complicated further when the family's doctor is accused of murder. Thriller, starring Marius Goring and Penelope Dudley-Ward

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Camden and Sydenham for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb advises British house-hunters looking for a place in Crete, showing them round a traditional Greek home, a modern village property and an old Venetian-style farm, each for less than £60,000

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: A south London couple gamble their savings in an attempt to raise enough cash to buy their dream home in the countryside. The plan is to renovate their two-bedroom former council flat so they can make money by renting it out for as much as possible. Property developer Sarah Beeny keeps an eye on their progress

programme.title: I Was There: The Great War Interviews
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, the BBC spoke to almost 300 people about their experiences during the First World War for landmark series The Great War, but only a fraction of the interviews were broadcast. This programme airs a selection of the original material, most of which has never been screened before, with recollections of the horrors of artillery bombardment and fleeting outbreaks of peace on the battlefield, as well as the stories of those on the home front waiting for news of their loved ones. Narrated by Samuel West

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Hitler's deputy, Rudolf Hess, the third in line to leadership of Nazi Germany, who was declared insane by the Fuehrer after making an unexpected errand of peace to Britain in 1941. The senior Nazi's fitness to stand trial was at the centre of his case in the tribunal. Narrated by Matthew MacFadyen and starring Ben Cross as Hess

programme.title: Obsessed with My Body
programme.desc: With British boys now apparently spending 30 per cent more time in the bathroom than teenage girls and taking twice as many selfies, this documentary follows some of those in search of the perfect body. From bodybuilding and eyebrow waxing to make-up, the film also examines how far they will they go to achieve perfection. And what happens when things are taken to extremes?

programme.title: UCMMA
programme.desc: Some of the UK's finest Mixed Martial Arts fighters tear it up in the cage with intense action from East London's iconic venue, The Troxy

programme.title: Warrior Challenge
programme.desc: MMA & K1 from the Troxy in London title fight Mihai Zmarandescu vs Alfie Hawes plus Erol Raif vs George Zorilov, Kat Freeman vs Kat Twardowska

programme.title: Bare Knuckle
programme.desc: Documentary exploring bare knuckle boxing's rise in popularity, its evolution through centuries, legal issues & the fight to give modern day boxers professional recognition

programme.title: Cardboard Gangsters (2017)
programme.desc: A gang of lads selling drugs in Darndale in Dublin's Northside sets out to gain more money and power and enter the big leagues of the narcotics trade. Things begin to unravel quickly as not everyone in the area is willing to let them achieve the notoriety they crave without a fight. Thriller, starring John Connors and Fionn Walton

programme.title: Food Junkies
programme.desc: Cabbie Joey Bone road-tests three burger bars, Kerryann Dunlop whips up a mean chicken stir fry, and Tottenham's soul food sisters do their trademark curry goat

programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls

programme.title: Mother Lode (1982)
programme.desc: A couple of adventurers go into the wilds of British Columbia in search of a lost colleague, but when their plane crashes they find themselves at the mercy of a crazy old Scottish miner who has lived in isolation for many decades. Action adventure, directed by and starring Charlton Heston, with Kim Basinger and Nick Mancuso

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Newlyweds Peter and Sharon Casley are offered advice by Amanda Lamb as they search for a second home in Auvergne, France. They explore the potential of three unusual homes, choosing between a 12th-century chateau, an ancient fort and a property built into a rock face

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets a Tonbridge family who have resigned themselves to life on a building site as they attempt to modernise and extend their three-bedroom bungalow in the hope of moving up the property ladder

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Hitler's deputy, Rudolf Hess, the third in line to leadership of Nazi Germany, who was declared insane by the Fuehrer after making an unexpected errand of peace to Britain in 1941. The senior Nazi's fitness to stand trial was at the centre of his case in the tribunal. Narrated by Matthew MacFadyen and starring Ben Cross as Hess

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims being made in the media. Surgeon Gabriel Weston takes part in an experiment at the University of Surrey's Sleep Research Centre to discover whether an extra hour in bed could have major benefits, while A&E specialist Dr Saleyha Ahsan asks if people can be overweight and still healthy, and tests the accuracy of two different methods used to assess fatness

programme.title: Iron Men (2017)
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with the fans of West Ham United as they move to a new home after 112 years at Upton Park. Featuring Slaven Bilic, Mark Noble Mabel Arnold and Ray Winstone

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: A Random Encounter (2013)
programme.desc: Two strangers trying to make their way in Hollywood meet by chance in a coffee shop, and come away unable to stop thinking about one another. However, they both soon discover that they have no way of tracking the other down. Romantic comedy, starring Abby Wathen, Michael Rady, Meghan Markle and Sean Young

programme.title: The Chant of Jimmie Blacksmith (1978)
programme.desc: An Australian farmhand of half-Aboriginal descent tries to get by in the face of cruelty and prejudice. A betrayal by his white employers tips him over the edge, and he embarks on a campaign of violent revenge for all the injustices he has endured. Historical drama, starring Tommy Lewis and Freddy Reynolds

programme.title: The Fast Lady (1963)
programme.desc: A cycling enthusiast on a modest civil servant's salary gives up his beloved bike to a buy a luxury car to impress a local magistrate's daughter. However, he first has to pass his driving test to stand any chance of winning her heart - and in the process ends up in a wild car-chase after a gang of robbers. Comedy, with Julie Christie, Stanley Baker, James Robertson Justice, Leslie Phillips and Dick Emery

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: An actor pours his savings into revamping his two-bedroomed home in Plaistow, east London, in the hope of making a killing on the property market

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor

programme.title: Codebreaker
programme.desc: The first of a two-part docu-drama uncovering the secret of how a 24-year-old maths student and a GPO engineer hacked into Hitler's personal code machine - not the Enigma coding system, but something even more intimidating known as his 'secret writer'. Despite his achievements, codebreaker Alan Turing's life was dogged by tragedy

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: It is five months since the Hollands moved into Eaton Place, and Rose is officially installed as housekeeper, while Lady Agnes has manoeuvred the house to the centre of London society - and her joy is compounded by the news she is pregnant. But storm clouds are gathering in Europe, and Lady Persie falls under the spell of Oswald Mosley and his British Union of Fascists, forming an alliance that will drag her into moral and physical peril. Keeley Hawes, Jean Marsh and Claire Foy star

programme.title: Mob Handed (2016)
programme.desc: A journalist is outraged to receive no help from the police when her daughter is murdered, and resolves to take the law into her own hands. Her mission of vengeance leads her to join a gang of football hooligans pledged to bring vigilante justice to anyone who harms children. Thriller, starring Yvette Rowland and Robin Reid

programme.title: Abraham's Point (2008)
programme.desc: A man who left his childhood home in Wales 15 years previously decides to face up to his troubled past. He steals a grandfather clock and takes it on a journey across the country, intending to return the vintage timepiece to his father, who is dying. Drama, starring Mackenzie Crook and Joseph Milson

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Phillip Schofield hosts a festive edition of the game show. Loose Women's Sherrie Hewson and Lisa Maxwell are joined by their former co-panellist Denise Welch to take on the Cube together, aiming to complete a series of fiendishly difficult trials to raise money for charity. Olympic long-jump gold medallist Greg Rutherford also tackles the challenge, but will he match fellow athlete Mo Farah's record and scoop the jackpot?

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Gym instructor Chris thinks he can use his fitness skills to win big, while student Sophie hopes she can outsmart The Cube. Both contestants try to complete a series of increasingly difficult challenges, ranging from agility tests to skill trials, under pressure to hold their nerve as friends, family and the studio audience watch their every move. The further they go in the competition, the more money they win, up to a jackpot of £250,000. Phillip Schofield hosts

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Athlete Mo Farah competes in the game show, recorded shortly before he went on to win two gold medals in the London Olympic Games. Given nine lives at the start, he aims to complete up to seven fiendishly difficult challenges, ranging from agility tests to skill trials, in the hope of winning up to £250,000 for his charity, the Mo Farah Foundation. Could this remarkable athlete be the first person to take away the jackpot? Phillip Schofield hosts
